name: Mosquitto
compose:
name: slashnode-mosquitto
services:
  broker:
    image: eclipse-mosquitto:2.1.2-alpine
    container_name: broker
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    volumes:
      - broker_data-config:/mosquitto/config:rw
      - broker_data-mosquitto:/mosquitto/data:rw
      - broker_data-log:/mosquitto/log:rw
  web:
    image: nginx:1.27
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - broker
    volumes:
      - web_data-www:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro
      - web_data-nginx-default.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9021:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  broker_data-config:
    name: slashnode-mosquitto_broker_data-config
  broker_data-mosquitto:
    name: slashnode-mosquitto_broker_data-mosquitto
  broker_data-log:
    name: slashnode-mosquitto_broker_data-log
  web_data-www:
    name: slashnode-mosquitto_web_data-www
  web_data-nginx-default.conf:
    name: slashnode-mosquitto_web_data-nginx-default.conf
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (mosquitto). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://mosquitto.org/. ⚠️ SECURITY: broker: declares ports ["1883:1883"] — left UNpublished, add by hand if required.
